message:
fix: LIMIT 0 guard in VDBE codegen + aggregate-in-scalar GROUP BY evaluation

Two fixes closing core SQL execution gaps:

1. LIMIT 0 now returns empty result set. Previously DecrJumpZero didn't
   fire when the limit register was already 0, so all rows were emitted.
   Added emit_limit_zero_guard() that checks before entering the loop.

2. Expressions wrapping aggregates (e.g. COALESCE(SUM(x), 0), COUNT(*)*2,
   CASE WHEN SUM(x)>N...) now evaluate correctly in GROUP BY queries.
   Added eval_group_agg_join_expr() and expr_contains_agg() to pre-compute
   aggregate sub-expressions over the group before evaluating the outer
   scalar expression.

New conformance oracle tests: 60+ queries covering LIMIT/OFFSET,
LEFT JOIN aggregation, DISTINCT+LIMIT, CAST, type coercion, and
aggregate-inside-scalar patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
